Frequently Asked Questions

What are the turnaround times for deliverables? +

Photos: 24 hours from shoot date

Videos: 48–72 hours from shoot date

What exactly is included in each package? +

Listing Photos: Based on square footage of home

Video Walkthrough: One branded and one unbranded version

3D Tour: Zillow's proprietary 3D Home tour

Closing Video: One social reel (9:16 vertical, unless specified otherwise) including a testimonial, plus 4 photos (with and without agent)

Batch Content: 5–10 fully edited informational videos at specified location

How are revisions handled? +

Revisions are made without charge within reason. Please put any specific details or requests in the notes section of your booking form so our media professionals know exactly what you're looking for.

Is pricing negotiable? +

Pricing is based on the package you select. No haggle or negotiation — we keep our rates fair and consistent for all agents. Quality and fair pricing for everyone.

What about video formats and aspect ratios? +

Formats are specified based on where you'll post. Each platform has its ideal format. We prioritize vertical format (9:16) for video since people live on their phones. We'll shoot and edit specifically for the format you need.

About Media Lab

Who We Are

Media Lab is a premium real estate production studio specializing in high-quality photography and videography for agents and their clients. We believe exceptional visual content is essential to selling properties effectively.

Our Approach

We prioritize understanding your needs and delivering content tailored to your marketing strategy. From HDR photography to cinematic video tours, we use professional equipment and proven techniques to showcase properties in their best light. Every detail matters — from lighting and composition to editing and final delivery.

Why Choose Media Lab
  • Professional-grade equipment and editing
  • Fast turnaround times (24–72 hours)
  • Flexible packages to suit your needs
  • Real-time availability scheduling
  • Expert team with years of experience
  • Unlimited revisions within reason
Ready to Elevate Your Listings?
Schedule a shoot today and see the difference professional content makes.
